title: Intense Algerian Oats Hash
description: A salty, crunchy breakfast hash featuring ground oats, a saffron-infused soffritto base, and simmered tomatoes, tailored for diabetic-friendly meal prep.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in the diced carrot and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
Pour in the tomato puree and sprinkle the oregano, cumin, salt, and pepper, stirring to combine.
Add the ground oats, mixing thoroughly to coat with the sauce and let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the hash, then remove from heat.
Transfer to a container for meal prep and chill before serving.
Reheat in a skillet for 2 minutes before serving to regain crunch.
